title: selaginella engleri
intro: Selaginella engleri, also known as resurrection fern, is a species of plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of small, herbaceous plants that thrive in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its unique ability to revive itself after drying out, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella engleri include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Selaginella engleri is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
